title: CaloCraft 2
description:
CaloCraft is a combination of mods to create a personally satisfying Minecraft experience. It comprises of 240+ Mods and Resource Packs, ranging from world gen changes to new items and mechanics.

2.0 currently in Beta and anything is subject to change
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c130236d6a2d139f3fc828c84546faf12717a27c.png)
# Welcome to CaloCraft 2.0!

### DISCLAIMER: Only the LEGACY (1.0 and 1.1) Branches are on 1.20.1, only 2.0 is on 1.21.1!

##

### What is CaloCraft?

CaloCraft is a Modpack that I created to enchance Minecraft to the point that it is what I would consider a satisfying experience. The modpack creates a sense of life in the world. I want the world to feel lived in, and not simply existing around the player.

##

## CaloCraft 2.0 is in Beta!

CaloCraft 2 was rebuilt from the ground up for 1.21.1 and will replace CaloCraft Legacy as the main version when more of the major mods from 1.20.1 are updated. Since I am not a mod developer, I have no timeline on when 2.0 will be "finished". But as more of the Legacy mods get updated, 2.0 will follow in suit. I am currently happy with it as it stands as the performance of 2.0 is significantly superior to Legacy.

## CaloCraft 2.0 New Features:

 - Updated Trial Chambers
- Craftable Tridents, Saddles and Leather
- Farmers Delight
- Return of Waystones
- Veinminer as a Feature, not an enchantment
- Revamped Difficulty
- New Enchantments and Less Enchantment Restrictions
  - I.e Mending and Infinity on the same Bow
- New Sounds
  - Footsteps and World Ambience
- New Particle Interactions

## Mods that I am looking to port forward are as follows:

- Adventures in Time
- Hybrid Aquatic
- Aquamirae
- Naturalist
- Good Ending
- WilderNature
- Enderman Overhaul

## Performance

The now-scrapped Legacy 1.2 Update was just barely able to hit 60FPS and suffered from severe FPS stutters and crashes. 

2.0 is now able to hit 90-120FPS at 16 Chunks of Render Distance and Complimentary Unbound with Integrated PBR enabled. 

*The system that both 1.2 and 2.0 were tested on has an RTX 4070 and Ryzen 7 9700X with 64GB of RAM, with 20GB allocated to the installation instance*

2.0 can run with 10-12GB of Allocated RAM comfortably. 8GB is possible but do expect some performance hitches.


##

Currently, 2.0 is missing the TARDIS, Various Mob additions, such as Aquamirae, Hybrid Aquatic and various other mods that added a sense of life to the world.

Not every mod from Legacy will be ported to 2.0, as the now scrapped 1.2 update for Legacy caused significant performance issues. 

## CaloCraft Legacy (1.0 - 1.1) Major Content Mods List:

-  Adventures in Time
-  Ad Astra
-  Aquamirae
-  Hybrid Aquatic
-  Jewelery
-  Wizards
-  Archers
-  Paladins and Priests
-  Death Knights
-  Rouges and Warriors
-  BetterArchaeology
-  Immersive Machinery
-  Prox Chat 
-  Deeper and Darker


## [Mod Tutorial Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLJOgsFfRatO5OqJaFg_UcsOyOHVmsMZFA)


**I claim no ownership or credit for any of the mods, resource or shader packs featured here. All credit goes to the original creators and developers. I have only comprised them into this one pack to create a personally satisfying minecraft experience.**
